name: Kids Lego Builder
description: Fun animated-style video for kids aged 4-10 building a Lego set step by step
promptTemplate: Step by step kids guide to building a Lego {SET_NAME} set, fun and energetic for children aged 4-10. Use simple words, lots of excitement and short sentences. Include: opening the box, sorting pieces by colour, snapping bricks together, adding details, and celebrating the finished build.
mustHave: sound effects descriptions, encouragement for kids, high five at the end
avoid: complex words, long sentences, anything scary or negative

presets.label: Lego Castle
presets.prompt: Step by step kids guide to building a Lego Castle set, fun and energetic for children aged 4-10
presets.mustHave: knights, towers, castle walls, high five at the end

presets.label: Lego City
presets.prompt: Step by step kids guide to building a Lego City set with cars and buildings, fun for kids aged 4-10
presets.mustHave: cars, roads, buildings, police station, high five at the end

presets.label: Lego Space
presets.prompt: Step by step kids guide to building a Lego Space rocket set, fun and energetic for children aged 4-10
presets.mustHave: rockets, astronauts, stars, blast off moment, high five at the end

presets.label: Lego Friends
presets.prompt: Step by step kids guide to building a Lego Friends set with a playhouse, fun for kids aged 4-10
presets.mustHave: colourful bricks, friends characters, playhouse, high five at the end

presets.label: Lego Technic
presets.prompt: Step by step kids guide to building a Lego Technic car, fun and energetic for children aged 6-10
presets.mustHave: gears, wheels, engine parts, wow moment, high five at the end

style.visualStyle: bright cartoon animation style, colourful Lego bricks, white background

imagePromptPrefix: Bright colourful cartoon animation style, child-friendly, Lego bricks,
voiceStyle: energetic, friendly, enthusiastic children presenter voice
